subcodes.first_line: O Ḥasan! Upon thee be the peace of God and His loving-kindness. We testify that thou didst hear and turn thyself, and didst attain unto that which was hidden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س ن علیک سلام الله و عنایته نشهد انک سمعت و اقبلت و فزت بما کان مکنونا فی
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
